Wait: s = sqrt(3). BE = sqrt(3)*s = sqrt(3)*sqrt(3)=3. SU = s = sqrt(3). RE = s = sqrt(3). product = 3 * sqrt(3) * sqrt(3) = 3 * 3 = 9. So correct. The assistant also gave final answer 9. So no mismatch.
